Hub Home > Social Proof & PR > Testimonial Request Email Sequence

Testimonial Request Email Sequence

Generate a 2-email sequence to request customer testimonials — a warm initial ask and a gentle follow-up — plus a structured questionnaire that guides customers to give specific, usable testimonials instead of generic "great product" responses.

Beginner PASTE & GO Revenue-driving
Pro tip

Never ask "Can you write us a testimonial?" — that is a blank page problem. Instead, ask 3-4 specific questions that guide them to describe their before/after transformation. Then you assemble the testimonial from their answers.

testimonials social proof customer reviews case study trust

How to use this prompt

  1. Pick your AI model. Choose the tab for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini or Copilot — each variant is tuned for that model.
  2. Copy the full prompt. Click Copy Full Prompt to copy the text to your clipboard.
  3. Paste into your AI tool. Open your chosen model and paste the prompt into a new chat.
  4. Replace the [placeholders]. Swap any bracketed fields for your company name, audience, product or tone.
  5. Run and refine. Review the output. If anything is off, ask the AI to tighten tone, length or format.

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a customer success specialist who knows how to get great testimonials from happy customers.

<business_context>
Business: [NAME] — [WHAT YOU SELL]
Customer name: [FIRST NAME]
What they...
You are a customer success specialist who knows how to get great testimonials from happy customers.

<business_context>
Business: [NAME] — [WHAT YOU SELL]
Customer name: [FIRST NAME]
What they...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a customer success specialist who knows how to get great testimonials from happy customers.

<business_context>
Business: [NAME] — [WHAT YOU SELL]
Customer name: [FIRST NAME]
What they bought/use: [PRODUCT OR SERVICE]
How long they have been a customer: [DURATION]
Known win: [ANYTHING YOU KNOW WENT WELL — e.g., "they said they loved the onboarding", "their team adopted it fast"]
Where the testimonial will be used: [WEBSITE / CASE STUDY / SOCIAL MEDIA / SALES DECK / ALL]
</business_context>

Generate:

**1. Initial request email:**
- Subject line: warm and personal, not corporate
- Body: 100 words max. Acknowledge their specific experience (reference the known win). Explain why their story matters. Make the ask feel easy — "just 5 minutes, 4 quick questions." Include the questionnaire inline or as a link.

**2. Questionnaire (4 questions):**
These questions must guide the customer to give specific, story-driven responses:
- Q1: What problem were you trying to solve before you found us? (establishes the "before")
- Q2: What made you decide to try [product/service]? (captures the decision trigger)
- Q3: What specific result or change have you seen since using [product/service]? (the "after" — push for numbers or concrete outcomes)
- Q4: What would you tell someone who is on the fence about trying [product/service]? (the recommendation — this is often the most quotable line)

**3. Follow-up email (5-7 days later):**
- 50 words max. Friendly nudge. Offer to do it as a 5-minute phone call instead if writing feels like work.

**4. Testimonial assembly guide:**
Show how to take raw questionnaire answers and turn them into a polished 2-3 sentence testimonial with the customer's approval. Provide a before/after example.
Notes: The questionnaire approach consistently produces better testimonials than open-ended requests. Claude structures the progression from problem to result naturally.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a customer success specialist. Help me request and collect great testimonials.

**Context:**
- Business: [NAME] — [WHAT YOU SELL]
- Customer: [FIRST NAME]
- What...
Act as a customer success specialist. Help me request and collect great testimonials.

**Context:**
- Business: [NAME] — [WHAT YOU SELL]
- Customer: [FIRST NAME]
- What...

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a customer success specialist. Help me request and collect great testimonials.

**Context:**
- Business: [NAME] — [WHAT YOU SELL]
- Customer: [FIRST NAME]
- What they use: [PRODUCT/SERVICE]
- How long: [DURATION]
- Known win: [WHAT WENT WELL]
- Usage: [WEBSITE/CASE STUDY/SOCIAL/SALES DECK]

**Create:**

1. **Request email** (100 words max): warm subject line, reference their win, explain why their story matters, link to 4-question survey below.

2. **4-question survey:**
- What problem were you solving?
- What made you try us?
- What specific results have you seen? (push for numbers)
- What would you tell someone on the fence?

3. **Follow-up email** (5-7 days, 50 words max): friendly nudge, offer phone call option.

4. **Assembly guide:** How to turn raw answers into a polished 2-3 sentence testimonial with a before/after example.
Notes: Create a Custom GPT with your product details pre-loaded to generate personalized request emails at scale.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

I need help requesting testimonials from happy customers.

**Context:**
- Business: [NAME] — [WHAT WE SELL]
- Customer: [FIRST NAME]
- They use: [PRODUCT/SERVICE] for [DURATION]
- Known win: [WHAT WENT WELL]
- Testimonial for: [WEBSITE/CASE STUDY/SOCIAL/SALES DECK]

**Create:**
1. Request email (100 words max) — warm, personal, reference their win, include 4-question survey
2. 4 guided questions: problem before, why they chose us, specific results (push for numbers), what they would tell someone on the fence
3. Follow-up email (50 words max, 5-7 days later) — nudge with phone call option
4. Guide to assembling raw answers into a polished testimonial (with example)
Notes: Gemini can research the customer's company in real-time to personalize the request email.

- Customer name: [FIRST NAME]
- What they use:...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Help me ask a happy customer for a testimonial the right way.

**My situation:**
- Business: [NAME] — [WHAT WE SELL]
- Customer name: [FIRST NAME]
- What they use: [PRODUCT/SERVICE]
- How long: [DURATION]
- Something that went well: [DESCRIBE]
- I will use this on: [WEBSITE/SOCIAL MEDIA/SALES DECK]

**I need:**
1. An email asking for their testimonial (100 words max) — friendly, mention what went well, make it easy by giving them 4 simple questions to answer
2. The 4 questions: What problem were they solving? Why did they pick us? What results did they see (ask for numbers)? What would they tell someone thinking about trying us?
3. A follow-up email if they do not respond (50 words, send 5-7 days later) — offer to do a quick phone call instead
4. A guide showing me how to take their answers and turn them into a short 2-3 sentence testimonial I can use (with an example)
Notes: Copilot in Outlook can send the request and schedule the follow-up automatically.

Frequently Asked Questions

What does the Testimonial Request Email Sequence prompt do?

Generate a 2-email sequence to request customer testimonials — a warm initial ask and a gentle follow-up — plus a structured questionnaire that guides customers to give specific, usable testimonials instead of generic "great product" responses.

Which AI models is this prompt tested on?

This prompt is field-tested on Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Each model has its own optimized variant above.

Do I need a paid AI account to use this prompt?

No. This prompt is written to run on the free tier of Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Paid tiers simply give you longer context windows and faster responses.

Can I customize this prompt for my business?

Yes. Any text inside square brackets is a placeholder you replace with your own business details, such as company name, audience, product or tone. You can also ask the AI to adjust format, length or style after the first output.

When was this prompt last verified?

Each model variant above shows its own freshness stamp. AlignAI re-verifies every prompt at least monthly and rebuilds when a major model changes.
